title: Rank From Stream
description: Read integers from a stream and support two operations: - `track(x)`: record a new number - `getRankOfNumber(x)`: return how many tracked numbers are less than or equal to `x` **Example:** ``` Input: ["StreamRank", "getRankOfNumber", "track", "getRankOfNumber"] [[], [1], [0], [0]] Output: [null, 0, null, 1] ``` **Notes:** - `x <= 50000` - At most `2000` calls are made in total.
